---
class-title: "Investigating 'Child Care Deserts' in Kansas"
class-subtitle: "A hands-on data analysis exercise for introductory data science course."
audience: "Undergraduate (Introductory)"
time: "XX-minute class session"
tools: "Python or R"
toc: false
---

```{=html}

<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/bootstrap-icons/1.10.5/font/bootstrap-icons.min.css">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="../../project_classplan_style.css">

<div class="container">
    <!-- Header Section -->
    <header class="class-plan-header">
        <p class="tagline">Educational Module</p>
        <h2>{{< meta class-title >}}</h2>
        <p class="subtitle">{{< meta class-subtitle >}}</p>
    </header>

    <!-- Top Details Grid -->
    <div class="top-details-grid">
        <!-- Module Details Card -->
        <div class="card">
            <h3 class="card-title">Module Details</h3>
            <ul class="details-list">
                <li>
                    <i class="bi bi-person-workspace icon"></i>
                    <div>
                        <strong>Target Audience:</strong>
                        {{< meta audience >}}
                    </div>
                </li>
                <li>
                    <i class="bi bi-clock-fill icon"></i>
                    <div>
                        <strong>Estimated Time:</strong>
                        {{< meta time >}}
                    </div>
                </li>
                <li>
                   <i class="bi bi-pc-display icon"></i>
                    <div>
                        <strong>Required Tools:</strong>
                        {{< meta tools >}}
                    </div>
                </li>
            </ul>
        </div>
        
        <!-- Related Resources Card -->
        <div class="card">
            <h3 class="card-title">Related Resources</h3>
            <div class="resource-buttons">
                <!-- UPDATE THESE LINKS to point to the correct project and data pages -->
                <a href="../projects/project_KAC.html" class="btn btn-project">
                    <i class="bi bi-info-circle-fill icon"></i> View Project Page
                </a>
                <a href="../datasets/data_KAC.html" class="btn btn-dataset">
                   <i class="bi bi-clipboard-data-fill icon"></i> Explore the Dataset
                </a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

:::{.card}
:::{.lesson-guide-card}

## Class Plan Guide {.main-title}

### <i class="bi bi-bullseye icon"></i> Learning Objectives 

-   Objective 1
-   Objective 2
-   Objective 3

### <i class="bi bi-card-list icon"></i> Class Outline

**Part 1: Introduction & Context**

Description of the introduction

**Part 2: Guided Activity**

Description of the main activity 

**Part 3: Discussion & Warp-up**

Description of the conclusion

### <i class="bi bi-pencil-square icon"></i> Assignment 

:::{.assignment-box}
Your task is to... 

Your assignment must include: 

-   Requirement 1
-   Requirement 2

:::
:::
:::
